name: Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Gateway Ultra
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Gateway Ultra
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Gateway Ultra – Compact Gateway with UniFi OS
short_description: Quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 at 1.5 GHz, 3 GB RAM, 16 GB storage, (4) 1 Gbps + (1) 2.5 Gbps RJ45, USB Type-C
description: Quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 at 1.5 GHz, 3 GB RAM, 16 GB storage, (4) 1 Gbps + (1) 2.5 Gbps RJ45, USB Type-C

detailed_description.heading: Unleashed Performance
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Cloud Gateway Ultra is a powerful and compact multi-WAN gateway designed to optimize your network performance and security. Whether you're managing a home network or a small business environment, this versatile device offers a comprehensive solution. Enjoy uninterrupted connectivity with automatic failover and load balancing across multiple internet connections. Experience smooth and secure network operations with 1 Gbps routing, integrated intrusion detection/prevention system (IDS/IPS), and advanced security features.

detailed_description.heading: Centralized Control
detailed_description.text: The Cloud Gateway Ultra simplifies network management with its intuitive UniFi Network software interface. Run the entire UniFi Network application directly on the Cloud Gateway Ultra, eliminating the need for a dedicated controller. You can centrally manage over 30 UniFi Network devices and seamlessly connect with up to 300 clients for a scalable networking solution. Configure all your UniFi devices from a single platform and monitor network performance in real-time, gaining insights into traffic, bandwidth usage, and device health.

detailed_description.heading: Compact and Versatile
detailed_description.text: The Cloud Gateway Ultra boasts a compact design that fits seamlessly into any environment. The integrated 0.96" LCM status display provides real-time information about network activity. The Cloud Gateway Ultra is powered by a USB-C connection, offering a flexible and reliable power solution (adapter included). With its robust features, user-friendly management, and compact design, the Ubiquiti Cloud Gateway Ultra is an ideal solution for those seeking a reliable and secure multi-WAN gateway for their home or small business network.
